title: datura arborea var. aurea
intro: Datura arborea var. aurea, also known as the golden tree datura, is a rare and ornamental variety of the Datura arborea plant, which is a perennial shrub or small tree native to tropical regions. The plant contains tropane alkaloids, including scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been used for their medicinal properties, including sedation, pain relief, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Datura arborea var. aurea include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, although it should be used with caution due to potential side effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infused as an extract, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any products containing Datura arborea var. aurea.
